title: Pesticide law not affected
doc_html:
§996.7.  Pesticide law not affected

The provisions of R.S. 40:996.1 et seq. shall not be construed to apply to any substance regulated by the provisions of the Louisiana Pesticide Law.

Acts 2012, No. 347, §1.
